rect.aria-label: X axis shows Total Trip Time (in Hours) and ranges from 0 to 22
Y axis shows Miles per Hour and ranges from 0 to 140
Legend shows Car Make and has values Audi, BMW, Chevorlet, Ford, Honda, Kia, Lexus, Subaru, Tesla, Toyota, and Volkswagon
